'''shozafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetiferous|chaetiferous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetiferous|chaetiferous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shozafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozafithi|shozafithi]] || [[word:shozafiji|shozafiji]] || [[word:shozafishi|shozafishi]] || [[word:shozafiki|shozafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozafuthuthu|shozafuthuthu]] || [[word:shozafujuju|shozafujuju]] || [[word:shozafushushu|shozafushushu]] || [[word:shozafukuku|shozafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozafuthu|shozafuthu]] || [[word:shozafuju|shozafuju]] || [[word:shozafushu|shozafushu]] || [[word:shozafuku|shozafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozafufthuf|shozafufthuf]] || [[word:shozafufjuf|shozafufjuf]] || [[word:shozafufshuf|shozafufshuf]] || [[word:shozafufkuf|shozafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozafethe|shozafethe]] || [[word:shozafeje|shozafeje]] || [[word:shozafeshe|shozafeshe]] || [[word:shozafeke|shozafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozafothotho|shozafothotho]] || [[word:shozafojojo|shozafojojo]] || [[word:shozafoshosho|shozafoshosho]] || [[word:shozafokoko|shozafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozafotho|shozafotho]] || [[word:shozafojo|shozafojo]] || [[word:shozafosho|shozafosho]] || [[word:shozafoko|shozafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozafofthof|shozafofthof]] || [[word:shozafofjof|shozafofjof]] || [[word:shozafofshof|shozafofshof]] || [[word:shozafofkof|shozafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozafïfthïf|shozafïfthïf]] || [[word:shozafïfjïf|shozafïfjïf]] || [[word:shozafïfshïf|shozafïfshïf]] || [[word:shozafïfkïf|shozafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozafïfthïfthïf|shozafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shozafïfjïfjïf|shozafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shozafïfshïfshïf|shozafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shozafïfkïfkïf|shozafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozafïfthïf|shozafïfthïf]] || [[word:shozafïfjïf|shozafïfjïf]] || [[word:shozafïfshïf|shozafïfshïf]] || [[word:shozafïfkïf|shozafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozafïfthïf|shozafïfthïf]] || [[word:shozafïfjïf|shozafïfjïf]] || [[word:shozafïfshïf|shozafïfshïf]] || [[word:shozafïfkïf|shozafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozafæthæ|shozafæthæ]] || [[word:shozafæjæ|shozafæjæ]] || [[word:shozafæshæ|shozafæshæ]] || [[word:shozafækæ|shozafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozafathatha|shozafathatha]] || [[word:shozafajaja|shozafajaja]] || [[word:shozafashasha|shozafashasha]] || [[word:shozafakaka|shozafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozafatha|shozafatha]] || [[word:shozafaja|shozafaja]] || [[word:shozafasha|shozafasha]] || [[word:shozafaka|shozafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozafafthaf|shozafafthaf]] || [[word:shozafafjaf|shozafafjaf]] || [[word:shozafafshaf|shozafafshaf]] || [[word:shozafafkaf|shozafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shozafasha|shozafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozafshësha|shozafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozafrosha|shozafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozafmusha|shozafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozafyasha|shozafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozafnkshësha|goshozafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozafnkrosha|goshozafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozafnkmusha|goshozafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozafnkyasha|goshozafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shozazafasha|shozazafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozazafshësha|shozazafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozazafrosha|shozazafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozazafmusha|shozazafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozazafyasha|shozazafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozazafnkshësha|goshozazafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozazafnkrosha|goshozazafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozazafnkmusha|goshozazafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozazafnkyasha|goshozazafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shezæfasha|shezæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shezæfshësha|shezæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shezæfrosha|shezæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shezæfmusha|shezæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shezæfyasha|shezæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshezæfnkshësha|goshezæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshezæfnkrosha|goshezæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshezæfnkmusha|goshezæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshezæfnkyasha|goshezæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shozfafasha|shozfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozfafshësha|shozfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozfafrosha|shozfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozfafmusha|shozfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozfafyasha|shozfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozfafnkshësha|goshozfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozfafnkrosha|goshozfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozfafnkmusha|goshozfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozfafnkyasha|goshozfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
